findings.worker_claim: Scaffolded TypeScript/Node.js project with cashu-ts, package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ directory structure
findings.evidence: package.json exists with correct dependencies (@cashu/cashu-ts, express, typescript, jest, ts-jest, supertest). tsconfig.json configured. src/ directory has cashu/, l402/, integration/ subdirectories as specified. npm run build compiles clean (tsc --noEmit exits 0). .gitignore present. Commit bea6276.

findings.worker_claim: Implemented Cashu ecash integration with CashuClient class, token validation, types
findings.evidence: src/cashu/client.ts has full CashuClient class with getMintQuote(), mintTokens(), redeemToken(), validateToken() methods — all with real cashu-ts SDK calls (CashuMint, CashuWallet, getEncodedToken, getDecodedToken). src/cashu/validation.ts has proper validateToken() with format checks, mint trust checks, amount validation. src/cashu/types.ts defines CashuMintQuote, CashuRedeemResult, CashuMintConfig, CashuToken. No stubs, no TODOs. 13 unit tests in cashu.test.ts all pass. Commit bc1ae8f.

findings.worker_claim: Implemented L402 HTTP 402 middleware with HMAC macaroons, preimage verification, Express middleware
findings.evidence: src/l402/macaroon.ts implements generateMacaroon() and verifyMacaroon() using crypto HMAC-SHA256 with constant-time comparison (timingSafeEqual), proper base64url encoding, expiry checking. verifyPreimage() correctly hashes preimage and compares to paymentHash. src/l402/verification.ts parses L402 Authorization headers and verifies credentials. src/l402/middleware.ts is proper Express middleware: returns 402 with WWW-Authenticate header for unauthenticated requests, verifies L402 credentials, calls next() on success, returns 401 on failure. src/l402/types.ts defines L402Challenge, L402Credentials, MacaroonData, L402Config. 20 tests in l402.test.ts all pass. No stubs, no TODOs. Commit 988550f.

findings.worker_claim: Implemented Cashu-L402 integration layer with cashuL402Middleware, TokenRegistry, config, protected /api/data route
findings.evidence: src/integration/cashu-l402-middleware.ts implements cashuL402Middleware combining CashuClient + validateToken + TokenRegistry: offline validation (format, mint trust, amount), local replay check, mint redemption (double-spend prevention via wallet.receive), then marks spent. src/integration/token-registry.ts has proper TTL-based Map with cleanup. src/integration/config.ts loads CASHU_MINT_URL and REQUIRED_SATS from env with defaults. src/index.ts wires up Express app with /health and /api/data routes. No stubs, no TODOs. 25 integration tests pass (58 total). Commit f75cc32.

findings.worker_claim: Created comprehensive README.md with protocol overview, quick start, API reference
findings.evidence: README.md exists (229 lines). Contains project overview, L402 vs cashu-l402 comparison table, protocol flow diagrams, installation instructions, quick start with code examples, configuration env vars, API reference for middleware and types, Authorization header formats. Commit 580e4b5.

findings.worker_claim: Added integration test suite with 12 additional tests, 45 total (later 58 total after task 004)
findings.evidence: Three test files exist: cashu.test.ts (159 lines), l402.test.ts (222 lines), integration.test.ts (615 lines). All 58 tests pass across 3 suites. Tests cover: token validation, mint trust checks, macaroon generation/verification, preimage verification, L402 middleware 402/401/200 flows, Cashu-L402 integration flow, double-spend prevention, insufficient value rejection, untrusted mint rejection. Tests use proper mocking of cashu-ts externals. Commits ed57b00 and f75cc32.

No hardcoded values where real logic should be — config uses env vars with sensible defaults
console.log only in src/index.ts for server startup messages (appropriate)
All functions have real implementations using proper crypto (HMAC-SHA256, timingSafeEqual) and cashu-ts SDK

@types/express is in dependencies instead of devDependencies (minor, non-breaking)
